deviations.what: frameType values OneByHalf / TwoByHalf (since UI5 1.83) are newer than 1.71 but kept for the 1:1 port - the app needs a UI5 release >= 1.83 to render them; OneByOne / TwoByOne (1.71) were never affected.
systemInfo and appShortcut (since UI5 1.92) are newer than 1.71 but kept for the 1:1 port - the app needs a UI5 release >= 1.92 to render them.
url on the link tiles (since UI5 1.76) is newer than 1.71 but kept for the 1:1 port - the app needs a UI5 release >= 1.76 to render it.
the custom CSS class tileLayout (float: left) is kept and its style.css injected via a core:HTML content attribute (see CAPABILITIES.md) - confirm the float layout in a running system.
the relative test-resources image and backgroundImage paths are resolved to absolute sdk.openui5.org URLs so the tile images load standalone.
